focus: error propagation and trust-boundary closure across the facade, persistent adapter, database retrieval/operator code, md-generator child-process handling, and four corpus fallback classifiers

findingDetails.title: Post-query generation drift is mislabeled as no-fit in every corpus consumer
findingDetails.evidence: All four consumers detect a post-query generation mismatch but pass no-fit into builders that already model generation-mismatch as requery-required.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All four manifest-listed production classifiers repeat the branch; 76/76 focused tests show the current no-fit behavior is stable.
findingDetails.recommendation: Pass generation-mismatch through each post-query mismatch branch and assert requery-required proof semantics.

claimAdjudication.claim: All four corpus consumers suppress their modeled requery-required state by classifying post-query generation drift as no-fit.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Mismatch warnings, no-source-influence containment, and concurrent-generation tests were reviewed; they prevent P0 stale-source use but do not emit requery-required.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: No-fit may be intended as a safe target-derived continuation.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: An explicit governing contract defines post-query mismatch as no-fit and proves no caller relies on requery-required.

traceabilityChecks.evidence: Four consumers hard-code no-fit despite modeled generation-mismatch semantics.
Direct reads confirm propagation/typed shadow containment; all injected sync/async shapes are not executable-covered.
Direct reads confirm nonzero/error/signal rejection and malformed-JSON containment.
Direct guards plus focused database tests reject stale generations and path escapes.

noveltyJustification: One new weighted P1 (5) against six accumulated active P1 findings (30 weighted total); the cross-consumer stale-generation classification was not covered by prior moved-path or publication-digest passes.
edgeCases: Mismatch containment prevents stale hydration, limiting severity to P1.
md-generator TypeScript execution blocked by absent backend dependencies.
Code Graph unavailable; direct manifest evidence used.
integrationEvidence: Exact facade, adapter, database, md-generator, and four corpus consumers reviewed

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Second-pass security integration spans process, adapter, persistence, and four consumer trust boundaries.

deferred: full injected sync/async adapter failure matrix

reason: Mismatch branches do not hydrate stale cards and preserve no-source-influence containment.
